Name<br>{<br>get{<br><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>&nbsp;return&nbsp; _name<br>}<br>}<br><br>public Beer (string name, string brand){<br>&nbsp; &nbsp;_name= name ;<br>&nbsp; _brand = brand;<br>}<br><br>" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=4;spacingRight=4;overflow=hidden;rotatable=0;points=[[0,0.5],[1,0.5]];portConstraint=eastwest;whiteSpace=wrap;" vertex="1" parent="4"><mxGeometry y="70" width="240" height="200" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="7" value="DrinkWithBeer" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;childLayout=stackLayout;horizontal=1;startSize=29;horizontalStack=0;resizeParent=1;resizeParentMax=0;resizeLast=0;collapsible=0;marginBottom=0;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="-460" y="-840" width="280" height="320" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="8" value="private Beer beer;&nbsp;<br>private decimal _water;<br>private decimal _ sugar;" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#CC99FF;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=4;spacingRight=4;overflow=hidden;rotatable=0;points=[[0,0.5],[1,0.5]];portConstraint=eastwest;whiteSpace=wrap;" vertex="1" parent="7"><mxGeometry y="29" width="280" height="61" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="9" value="public DrinkWithBeer (decimal water , decimal sugar , Beer beer){<br>_warter&nbsp; = water,&nbsp;<br>_sugar&nbsp; = sugar,&nbsp;<br>_beer = beer<br>}<br>public&nbsp; void Build(){<br>&nbsp;Console.writeLine($"Drink&nbsp; with {_beer.Name}<br>, water: {water} and sugar : {_sugar}<br>");<br>}" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=4;spacingRight=4;overflow=hidden;rotatable=0;points=[[0,0.5],[1,0.5]];portConstraint=eastwest;whiteSpace=wrap;" vertex="1" parent="7"><mxGeometry y="90" width="280" height="230" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="10" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0.993;entryY=0.585;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" target="6"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="15" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" target="9"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="11" value="&nbsp;Contenedor" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;childLayout=stackLayout;horizontal=1;startSize=29;horizontalStack=0;resizeParent=1;resizeParentMax=0;resizeLast=0;collapsible=0;marginBottom=0;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="-820" y="-430" width="440" height="260" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="13" value="main{<br><br>&nbsp;var&nbsp; beer&nbsp; = new Beer ("Pinkantus ",&nbsp; "Erdinger");<br>var drinkWithBeer = new&nbsp; DrinkWithBeer(100, 50, beer);<br>drinkWithBeer.Build();<br><br>}" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=4;spacingRight=4;overflow=hidden;rotatable=0;points=[[0,0.5],[1,0.5]];portConstraint=eastwest;whiteSpace=wrap;" vertex="1" parent="11"><mxGeometry y="29" width="440" height="231" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="14" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0.576;entryY=1.004;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" target="6"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>

div.div:
Es uno de los patrones de diseño es mas utilizado , quita la responsabilidad a una clase de crear objetos a traves de otras clases, puede tener objetos hijos no debe saber como saberlo . es como cuando compras una cerveza ya te la dan hecha ya te la dan creada.
Los vamos inyectar en un método en un constructor , en .net la inyección es el constructor
